reference: In my opinion, this could be inflammation of the seventh cranial nerve or an allergic reaction. Take Atarax ten milligrams; it will ease your symptoms. Stay warm and avoid air currents. Good luck.
text: In my opinion, this could be inflammation of the seventh cranial nerve or an allergic reaction. Take a Tarax ten milligrams. It will ease your symptoms. Stay warm and avoid aircrafts. Good luck.
